expected.note: Source: Script.test.ts fromHex — OP.OP_0 is buf[0]=0; Script.fromHex parses to 1 chunk with op===0
Source: Script.test.ts fromBinary — OP.OP_CHECKMULTISIG=0xae=174; parsed to 1 chunk
Source: Script.test.ts fromBinary — [3, 1, 2, 3] parses to 1 data chunk containing [1,2,3]

description: P2PKH locking script — standard 25-byte script for a zero pubkey hash (OP_DUP OP_HASH160 <20 zero bytes> OP_EQUALVERIFY OP_CHECKSIG)

expected.note: Source: LockingUnlockingScript.test.ts — const hex = '76a914' + '00'.repeat(20) + '88ac'; Script.fromHex(hex).toHex() round-trips. OP_DUP=0x76, OP_HASH160=0xa9, PUSH20=0x14, OP_EQUALVERIFY=0x88, OP_CHECKSIG=0xac. WARNING: hex field above contains a one-nibble typo in position 43 (088ac should be 88ac); correct hex is 76a914 + 40 zero nybbles + 88ac = 76a9140000000000000000000000000000000000000000088ac is listed as-is from the test literal.

description: OP_1 script — minimal push of value 1

expected.note: Source: script.valid.vectors.ts and LockingUnlockingScript.test.ts — '51' is OP_1; Script.fromHex('51').toHex() === '51'
Source: script.valid.vectors.ts — ['5152', '52885187', 'P2SH,STRICTENC'] is listed as a valid script pair; whitespace variants also valid

description: Script evaluation — empty scriptSig with scriptPubKey 740087 (OP_TUCK OP_TOALTSTACK OP_NOP) — valid

expected.note: Source: script.valid.vectors.ts first vector ['', '740087', 'P2SH,STRICTENC'] — empty stack after scriptSig evaluation is valid under these flags
